payload.label: bed
payload.long_description: Close-up of a partial bed showing a striped gray-beige fabric bedspread and a matching pillow at the left, with a dark wooden headboard partially visible; the mattress and bedding are cropped by the image edges and appear about 0.6 m from the camera.
